mapper.sql: id, member_id, token_hash, expires_at, last_seen_at, revoked_at, client_ip, user_agent, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE pinova.member_login_session SET revoked_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now}, updated_by = member_id WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
